task_name: Medical Visualization and Simulation — Not an FLS Task

frame_analyses.description: Title slide: 'Medical Visualization and Simulation' from CAVI, University of Aarhus, 2005
Anatomical illustrations showing cardiac/cardiovascular structures with red highlighting
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Teaching material — not a performance task

frame_analyses.description: MRI or CT cross-sectional imaging of torso/abdomen
3D volumetric reconstruction of vascular anatomy from multiple angles
Side-by-side comparison of 2D cross-sectional and 3D reconstructed imaging
3D rendered cardiac model showing anatomical detail and chambers
Segmented cardiac structures with color-coded chambers
3D surgical simulation model of heart with anatomical detail, showing surgical planes
Simulated surgical instruments (appearing as linear objects) interacting with cardiac model
3D simulation showing catheter/endovascular instrument within cardiac/vascular anatomy
Magnified/close-up view of instrument-tissue interaction in simulated environment

confidence_rationale: This video is an educational/instructional presentation on medical visualization and simulation technologies (cardiac imaging, 3D reconstruction, and surgical simulation). It is NOT a Fundamentals of Laparoscopic Surgery (FLS) task performance. The content demonstrates imaging modalities and simulation capabilities but does not show a trainee or expert performing any of the five FLS tasks (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture). No scoring is applicable.
cannot_determine: Task identity — no FLS task is being performed
technique_summary: This is an educational video on medical visualization and cardiac/vascular simulation platforms. It is not an FLS task performance and cannot be scored using FLS rubrics.

demonstrated_techniques: 3D volumetric reconstruction from medical imaging data
Tissue segmentation and color-coding for anatomical identification
Integration of 2D and 3D imaging modalities for surgical planning
Surgical simulation environment setup with realistic cardiac anatomy
teaching_content.skill_level_demonstrated: instructional/educational overview of simulation and visualization technology
